title: WebCapture
description: Artifact contract for a web capture produced by a local browser session (e.g. BearBrowser). A WebCapture records what was captured, from where, and in what format. Content must be stored by content-addressed reference. PII-sensitive captures must be flagged for redaction before leaving the device boundary.

url.description: URL that was captured. Must match the captureScope declared on the BrowserSession.

ts.description: Timestamp when the capture was taken.

contentRef.description: Content-addressable reference (e.g. sha256:<hex>) to the raw capture data.

redacted.description: Whether a DiagnosticRedaction pass has been applied before export.

redactionRef.description: Reference to the DiagnosticRedaction record applied to this capture.

piiFlags.description: PII categories detected in this capture (e.g. ['email', 'phone-number']).
